subject: Fixed version in onap/Chart.yaml
commit_message:
Fixed version in onap/Chart.yaml

Updating version in chart information for onap project in accordance
with TSC-119

Issue-ID: OOM-1797

Change-Id: Id9d6caba09c33f84d418e214790aef716034b939
Signed-off-by: Tomáš Levora <t.levora@partner.samsung.com>
